session_summary: A single-turn session in which Marcus commissions the build of the /derivation-audit project skill: a read-only flag-only auditor that mechanizes the project's verification and citation-discipline standards over manuscript/derivation.qmd. His role was to fully specify the audit's standards (citation backing as BLOCKER, evidence-to-external-exact-text matching against literature/ files, reproducible-artifact pointers, [mc]-to-assert pairing, over-claiming and house-jargon detection) and to mandate grounding every check in the repo's real conventions plus a test run.

coded_turns.quote:
Create a project skill (slash command) that AUDITS the manuscript's sourced derivation for
  verification/best-practices compliance and emits a flag-only report. Read-only: it diagnoses and
  flags, it never edits.
coded_turns.note: Commissions the /derivation-audit skill; mechanizes citation discipline, evidence-to-source matching, reproducibility, and over-claiming gates into one enforceable auditor.
